en: Avetta PQF - United Arab Emirates Company Information

Registration for membership at the Chamber of Commerce and Industry is required for all companies operating out of the United Arab Emirates (UAE). There is a Chamber of Commerce and Industry for each of the Emirates:
Abu Dhabi Chamber
Ajman Chamber
Dubai Chamber
Fujairah Chamber
Ras al-Khaimah Chamber
Sharjah Chamber
Umm al-Quwain Chamber
